messages.content: I remember going to see the fireworks with my best friend. It was the first time we ever spent time alone together. Although there was a lot of people, we felt like the only people in the world.

situation: I remember going to the fireworks with my best friend. There was a lot of people, but it only felt like us in the world.

evidence: I remember going to see the fireworks with my best friend.
It was the first time we ever spent time alone together.
